summary: Iteration 15 testing complete: All requested features verified working. Email/password login, Google login redirect, Hamburger menu, Donations page (PayPal/IBAN), Profile page with Disconnetti and Elimina Account buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 15 features verified. Email/password login works. Google login redirects to auth.emergentagent.com correctly. Hamburger menu (☰) opens and shows Home, Bibbia, Diario, Profilo, Donazioni. Donations page shows PayPal (andrehangar@live.it) and full IBAN (IT46 I036 6901 6008 5802 8558 932) with BIC/SWIFT. Profile page has working Disconnetti (shows confirmation dialog) and Elimina Account buttons in Account section.

email_password_login.details: Email and password fields accept input, Accedi button submits form, redirects to home page with user greeting

google_login_button_visible.details: 'Continua con Google' button visible below email/password form with Google icon

google_login_redirect.details: Clicking Google button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with correct redirect URL parameter

post_login_redirect_home.details: After successful email/password login, user redirected to home page showing 'Buonasera, Test User' and daily verse

hamburger_menu_opens.details: Click on ☰ icon in top-right opens menu overlay at coordinates (1880, 30)

menu_items_present.details: Menu shows all 5 items: Home (with active indicator), Bibbia, Diario, Profilo, Donazioni

donations_bonifico_iban.details: Bonifico Bancario shows full IBAN: IT46 I036 6901 6008 5802 8558 932

donations_bank_details.details: Shows Intestatario: Andrea Confortino, Banca: Revolut Bank UAB, BIC/SWIFT: REVOITM2, Indirizzo: Via Dante 7, 20123, Milano (MI), Italy

profile_disconnetti_button.details: Disconnetti button visible in Account section with door icon (🚪)

profile_elimina_account_button.details: Elimina Account button visible in Account section with trash icon (🗑️)

disconnetti_functionality.details: Clicking Disconnetti shows confirmation dialog 'Vuoi uscire dal tuo account?', then redirects to /login page

screenshots_taken: /app/.screenshots/home_logged_in.png - Home page with user greeting and daily verse
/app/.screenshots/donations_page.png - Donations page with PayPal and Bonifico options
/app/.screenshots/google_auth_redirect.png - Emergent Auth page after Google click
